caption: A news broadcast segment features a split-screen layout with a male news anchor on the left and a remote guest on the right. The anchor is a Black man wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white shirt, and a maroon tie, positioned in front of a blue graphic that reads "PLUS POLITICS". The guest, also a Black man wearing a red traditional cap, appears in a smaller window under the heading "ON THE PHONE", with text identifying him as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS". A bold white banner across the bottom of the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a smaller banner displays "SUBSCRIBE", a YouTube URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA", and "LIFESTYLE" or "WATCH ON" alongside logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". The scene remains virtually static across the frames, with only minor changes in the banner text and the inclusion of "FOLLOW US" and social media icons in the final frame.
